forecasts.short: Scattered Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: Scattered showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 10pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. South wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Mostly cloudy, with a low around 57. Southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph.
